perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is an animation; it opens with a pink background filled with hearts and a bald, pink-cheeked character with large eyes and wings (Lapo). (2) A bald male character with a beard (A-Chiu) is seated in a room with shelves of collectibles, gesturing as he speaks. (3) Transition to a meadow scene where the Lapo character plucks petals from a flower with a hopeful expression. (4) Shift to a pink room where Lapo stares intensely at a smartphone with hearts in its eyes. (5) Transition to a brown room with two male characters on a couch; one character is annoyed while the other farts, indicated by green gas clouds. (6) Back to the studio setting, A-Chiu looks at his phone and vomits a rainbow of colors in mock disgust.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic synthesizer music begins; a energetic male voice introduces a concept in a friendly, storytelling tone. (2) Music continues as high-pitched 'ding' sound effects accompany visual transitions; the voice mimics a petals-plucking chant. (3) The tone shifts to a flatter, more cynical delivery during the 'Old Couple' segment, accompanied by a loud, flatulent sound effect (SFX). (4) The audio concludes with exaggerated gagging sounds and the narrator's voice becoming more frantic and disgusted while the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the narration throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: (1) '拉補仙子' (Lapo Fairy) - introduction title. (2) '暗戀期' (Secret Crush Phase) - large white title text with a nervous tone. (3) '熱戀期' (Passion Phase) - large white title text with a romantic tone. (4) '老夫老妻期' (Old Couple Phase) - large white title text with a blunt tone. (5) '對熱戀期感到噁心的老人' (The old man disgusted by the honeymoon phase) - concluding humorous label.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Concept Setup -> Stage 1 (Crush) -> Stage 2 (Passion) -> Stage 3 (Old Couple) -> Conclusion/Self-Reflection

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: The video is entirely animated; no real humans are present.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald animated male character with stubble wearing a black t-shirt, representing the creator.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An animator's studio with shelves of figures; a stylized green field with white clouds; a simplified living room with a brown couch.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Concept Intro -> Sequential Stages -> Synthesis/Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses original animation and humorous commentary to describe the evolution of romantic relationships. It creates a fictional 'Lapo Fairy' as a metaphor for romantic feelings, contrasting the early, obsessively sweet phases of dating with the blunt, unromantic reality of long-term partnership. The ultimate goal is to entertain the audience through relatable, self-deprecating humor about past sentimentality.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Original bald character design (A-Chiu), use of rainbow vomit as a recurring gag, specific fast-paced comedic timing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video's square format and fast editing style are optimized for short-form social media platforms. The high vocal density suggests a commentary-heavy influencer style.
